name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring subscription that automatically charges a customer's vaulted payment method on a defined billing cycle. The payment method must already be stored in the Braintree vault (either through a customer or standalone token). Supports trial periods, add-ons, discounts, prorated first billing, and configurable retry logic for failed payments.
note: Braintree uses a GraphQL API. The legacy REST API endpoint is POST /merchants/{merchant_id}/subscriptions.

parameters.name: plan_id
parameters.description: The ID of the subscription plan to use. Plans are created in the Braintree Control Panel and define price, billing cycle, trial period, and currency.

parameters.name: payment_method_token
parameters.description: The vaulted payment method token to charge on each billing cycle. Must belong to a vaulted customer.

parameters.name: price
parameters.description: Override the plan's default price. Must be a string with two decimal places.

parameters.name: first_billing_date
parameters.description: The date of the first billing charge in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be today or in the future.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Your own subscription ID. If not provided, Braintree generates one. Must be unique and alphanumeric.

parameters.name: trial_period
parameters.description: Whether this subscription starts with a trial period. If true, uses the plan's trial duration.

parameters.name: trial_duration
parameters.description: The length of the trial period. Used with trial_duration_unit.

parameters.name: trial_duration_unit
parameters.description: The unit for the trial duration. Options: 'day', 'month'.

parameters.name: number_of_billing_cycles
parameters.description: Total number of billing cycles before the subscription ends. If not set, the subscription renews indefinitely.

parameters.name: merchant_account_id
parameters.description: The merchant account ID for this subscription. Required for multi-currency setups.

body.query: mutation CreateSubscription($input: CreateSubscriptionInput!) { createSubscription(input: $input) { subscription { id planId status currentBillingCycle nextBillingDate price { value currencyCode } } } }
